---
mode: agent
agent: Architect
description: Provide a technical architecture-first explanation of selected code.
---

Analyze the selected code and produce a dry, highly technical explanation.

Requirements:
- Focus on control flow, data flow, state transitions, and dependency boundaries.
- Identify architectural patterns and coupling points.
- Explain invariants, side-effect boundaries, and failure modes.
- Skip basic programming concepts and beginner-level definitions.
- Keep tone concise and engineering-focused.
